title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem
notes: 2k res, both medium and high presets give 35-50fps which I think is not that good. Cannot say if it's because the game is alpha version, or if there's a performance hit. Minor glitches with some effect from time to time, but nothing that would make the game unplayable or unenjoyable.

title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem
notes: in alpha version, run, but can't connect to server (maybe server issues), fps about half windows, and stutter a lot to low-10 most of the time. change resolution/ quality crash the game.
I had great performance but very long load times
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: Arch users must use "Steam (Runtime)" and LLVM 7 or newer is required.

notes: Worked flawlessly. I had no issues at all.

notes: Works nice, can add that the Multiplayer Beta is working like a charm.

notes: Running everything on 'Very high'. Fps ~60 but I suspect the game is'nt optimized too well yet. Haven't seen any glitches so far, runs perfectly.
